me.location: I am open to work remote..|
me.motivation: I’m passionate about coding because it lets me turn ideas into real solutions. I enjoy tackling complex problems, learning continuously, and building meaningful digital experiences. I’m open to remote work and flexible with location.

skills.learning: I love learning new technologies, experimenting with creative solutions, and continuously improving my skills.

projects.bulletPoint2: How I have organised my work proces
projects.tab1About: The Pokémon Trainer Register is a web app that fetches Pokémon data from a public API, allowing users to explore types, abilities, stats, and images in a modern digital Pokédex.
projects.tab1How: I planned the features and component structure first, then integrated the API, built a responsive interface, and refined the app with clean, modular code.
projects.tab1What: I learned to work with REST APIs, manage dynamic data and loading states, structure scalable applications, and strengthen problem-solving while building maintainable code.
projects.tab2About: I created a jump-and-run game where the player becomes the hero controlling the action, combining fun gameplay with advanced programming concepts to deliver an engaging experience.
projects.tab2How: I started by planning the game mechanics and designing the object-oriented structure, then implemented the player controls, levels, and obstacles, and finally tested and refined the gameplay for smooth performance.
projects.tab2What: I learned to apply object-oriented programming in a real project, manage game state and logic, handle collision detection, and develop a structured approach to building interactive applications.
projects.tab3About: Together with other participants from the training, I helped build a web app using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Git, and Firebase, creating a project management tool that visualizes task status and responsibilities.
projects.tab3How: I collaborated closely with the team to plan features, set up version control with Git, implement the frontend and backend, and coordinate tasks to ensure smooth progress and integration.
projects.tab3What: I learned to work effectively in a team, manage a project using Git and Firebase, structure frontend and backend components, and develop practical skills in building a collaborative web application.
projects.tab4About: What are you currently working on and what features are you implementing? What is the key to success in your projects? You can mention good planning, code quality and execution.
projects.tab4p: Show a desire to learn new technologies and continually improve your skills.
